MixedUpParents 0.1.0.9999
  • Reference
    • Example run of MixedUpParents

Package index

All functions

IntervalsEmpty
An empty interval object saved in data for convenience
admix_fract_from_extended_segs()
Calculate admixture fractions from the extended segments
ancestral_n_segments()
Find the segments flanked by common number of copies of ancestry-specific alleles
ancestry_barplot()
Very simple summaries of extended ancestry segments
calc_HOT()
Count the number of homozygous opposites between a kid and candidate parents
chromo_segs()
Collapse runs of adjacent same-numbers of ancestral alleles into segments
diag_markers_10_fish
Marker data with of 10 fish from 3 sets of species-diagnostic markers
estimate_allele_freqs_EM()
Estimate allele frequencies in the different backgrounds by EM
extend_ancestral_segments_3()
Extend segments found by ancestral_n_segments for scenarios with three ancestries
extend_ancestral_segments_using_bedtools()
extend ancestral segments with three species using bedtools
integer_representation_EAS()
Create an integer representation of everyone's extended ancestry segments
intersect_ancestry_intervals_rcpp()
Intersect the ancestry intervals of individuals
pairwise_genotype_probs()
Calculate the genotype probabilities for pairs of individuals
pgp_rcpp()
Low level function to compute the pairwise genotype probabilities
plot_ancestral_segs()
Make a plot of the ancestral segments with 0, 1, or 2 copies of a species-specific allele
prepare_for_gpp()
Collect inputs for calculating genotype pair probabilities
ternary2int()
Convert vector representation of a ternary number to a decimal integer
trit2vec()
Helper function to turn trits to a vector of one or two ancestries

Developed by Eric C. Anderson.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
